# Security Checklist: Provide Basic Property Details for More Accurate Estimate

**Purpose**: Validate security-related requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/006-property-details-estimate/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are requirements defined for protecting location and attribute inputs as sensitive data? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements defined for limiting abusive estimate requests (rate limits or throttling)? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for logging and redaction of inputs in error paths? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK004 If any authentication/authorization is required for the estimate API, is it explicitly specified? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do failure requirements consistently state no estimate/range is shown on failures? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK006 Are requirements defined for dependency outages (normalization/valuation) and recovery behavior? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK007 Are security requirements specified for external service communication (e.g., HTTPS, timeouts)? [Gap] Note: Not necessary per spec/constitution.
